mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, product_id AS productId, qty, created_at AS createdAt FROM cart WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, product_id AS productId, qty, created_at AS createdAt FROM cart WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.member_id AS memberId, c.product_id AS productId, c.qty, c.created_at AS createdAt, p.product_name AS productName, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.price, p.stock_qty AS stockQty FROM cart c JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
